== Notes for [[Item:Q101628|Q101628]] ==

Flint, Shirley Cushing. [http://books.google.com/books?id=Ks3ZORm9KlMC&pg=PA14&lpg=PA14&dq=alonso+de+estrada&source=bl&ots=QtXmOGy0uh&sig=TGsWtkIv3AyjMDeWh3dhaLpbLX8&hl=en&sa=X&ei=eHtQVNioHZawyASQ_ILACQ&ved=0CEUQ6AEwBjgK#v=onepage&q=alonso%20de%20estrada&f=false ''No Mere Shadows: Faces of Widowhood in Early Colonial Mexico''.] University of New Mexico Press, Albuquerque, New Mexico, 2013, pages 13-44. … '''Chapter Two: “Doña Marina Gutierrez Flores de la Caballeria Takes The Reins”''' …

'''_____________________________'''

Dona MARIANA GUTIERREZ-FLORES-DE-LA-CABALLERIA 1498 in Ciudad Real, Castile, Spain, daughter of Don JUAN GUTIERREZ-DE-LA-CABALLERIA and Dona MAYOR FLORES-DE-GUEVARA. She was born in Ciudad Real, Castile, Spain, and died in Mexico City, D.F., Mexico?.

See: [http://www.bisabuelos.com Bisabuelos.com] for more info @@ Cavallería or Gutiérrez.

'''_____________________________'''

http://www.myheritage.com/research/collection-1/myheritage-family-trees?itemId=131600761-1-5133&action=showRecord&indId=externalindividual-8828f7e959fca64ee2af464258673085&mrid=3acbee1ba9ecc459894ae06358332533

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9B60871EFBBFA9822EF79916C517A
geni:6000000001500803731

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
